functional_focus: Starting and opening a professional meeting in English.
outcome: By the end of this week, learners can greet participants, start a meeting, and introduce the purpose using clear professional expressions.

tabs.title: Greeting Participants
tabs.micro_tip: Keep it simple and professional. A clear greeting sets the tone.

expressions.es: Hola a todos, gracias por unirse.

expressions.en: Thank you all for being here today.
expressions.es: Gracias a todos por estar aquí hoy.

expressions.en: It's great to see everyone here.
expressions.es: Es un gusto verlos a todos aquí.

expressions.en: Thanks for taking the time to join this meeting.
expressions.es: Gracias por tomarse el tiempo para unirse a esta reunión.

tabs.title: Starting the Meeting
tabs.micro_tip: Use a clear signal to begin. Short phrases work best.

expressions.en: I think we can start now.

tabs.title: Introducing the Purpose
tabs.micro_tip: State one clear purpose. Keep it short and specific.

expressions.en: The purpose of today's meeting is to discuss the new project.
expressions.es: El propósito de la reunión de hoy es hablar del nuevo proyecto.

expressions.en: Today we want to review the project progress.
expressions.es: Hoy queremos revisar el progreso del proyecto.

expressions.en: Today's meeting is about the new marketing strategy.
expressions.es: La reunión de hoy es sobre la nueva estrategia de marketing.

expressions.en: We are here today to talk about the next steps.
expressions.es: Estamos aquí hoy para hablar de los próximos pasos.

expressions.en: In this meeting, we will discuss the project timeline.
expressions.es: En esta reunión, hablaremos del cronograma del proyecto.

expressions.en: The goal of today's meeting is to share some updates.
expressions.es: El objetivo de la reunión de hoy es compartir algunas actualizaciones.

stories.title: Internal Team Meeting
text: Maria enters the meeting room and looks at the team.
After everyone sits down, she continues,
She opens her laptop and says,
The team members nod and prepare to share their updates.

stories.title: Meeting with a Client
text: David begins the meeting with the client.
He looks around the room and adds,
Then he explains the objective of the meeting.
The client listens carefully and opens their notebook to take notes.

ui_copy.title: Guided Meeting Opener Builder
ui_copy.subtitle: Build a professional meeting opener step by step using this week's expressions.
